title: Update docs for invited-talks Program template
objective: Update durable docs so the Program section description matches the current homepage wording: invited talks, poster sessions, coffee breaks, and lunch break only.
instructions: Review the latest Builder result and current homepage state before editing docs.
Update docs/product-specs/workshop-website.md so Current Behavior and near-term follow-up language match the revised Program template.
Only touch other docs if they explicitly mention the old generic Program wording and need alignment.
constraints: Treat docs/ as durable source of truth.
Do not modify product source code.
expected_outputs: Durable docs reflect the invited-talks/posters Program template.
definition_of_done: docs/product-specs/workshop-website.md matches the homepage Program content.
ResultPacket calls out any remaining provisional content clearly.
